title: Banner
description: Prominent notice to communicate state at page or section level. Supports semantic colors, variants, dismiss and sticky position.

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Four semantic colors with default icons.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual treatments: filled, subtle (default) and outline.

action.title: With action
action.desc: Right-side actions slot to anchor a CTA.

dismiss.title: Dismissable
dismiss.desc: Lets the user close the banner. Emits the dismiss event.

icon.title: With custom icon
icon.desc: Replace the icon with your own via the icon prop.

demo.infoDesc: Your account will sync in a few minutes.
demo.renewDesc: Renew to keep access to premium features.
demo.newDesc: v2 ships theming support and new components.

props.variant: Visual style applied to the banner.
props.title: Banner highlighted title.
props.description: Descriptive text. Replaced by the default slot when provided.
props.dismissable: Shows a close button that emits the dismiss event.
props.dismissAnimation: Animation used when closing the banner.
props.icon: Custom icon. Falls back to the default by color when omitted.
props.showIcon: Shows or hides the banner icon.
props.fullWidth: Removes the radius to anchor the banner edge-to-edge.

emits.dismiss: Emitted when the banner is closed while dismissable is active.

slots.default: Banner body content. Replaces the description prop when HTML is needed.
